sources.title: DarkBench: Benchmarking Dark Patterns in Large Language Models
sources.schema_summary: Official Apart Research Hugging Face dataset with 660 prompt rows across six dark-pattern categories.
sources.notes: Public-corpus candidate after sanitizer. Current fixtures remain project-authored paraphrases; any source-row use still needs manifest, redaction, and license review.

sources.title: DarkPatterns-LLM: A Multi-Layer Benchmark for Detecting Manipulative and Harmful AI Behavior
sources.license: paper page, not a fixture license
sources.schema_summary: Paper taxonomy and expert-annotation framing for manipulative LLM outputs.
sources.notes: Taxonomy-only unless a compatible dataset license is verified. No raw examples are imported.

sources.title: DarkBench+: An Extended Benchmark for Evaluating Dark Patterns in Large Language Models
sources.license: AAAI proceedings page, not a fixture license
sources.schema_summary: Published 2026 paper with expanded bilingual dark-pattern taxonomy.
sources.notes: Taxonomy-only unless a compatible dataset license is verified. Used for expanded category and cross-linguistic awareness; v1 public fixtures remain English.

sources.title: ELEPHANT: Measuring and understanding social sycophancy in LLMs
sources.schema_summary: Paper and benchmark framing for social sycophancy and excessive affirmation.
sources.notes: Paper taxonomy only for public fixtures. Any ELEPHANT benchmark rows or traces are restricted/eval-only until provenance and redistribution terms are reviewed.

sources.title: ATBench-Claw: OpenClaw-Oriented Agent Trajectory Safety Benchmark
sources.schema_summary: 500 JSON trajectory examples with trajectory, labels, and reason fields.
sources.notes: Public-corpus candidate after sanitizer. Raw trajectory events, tool results, and rationale text still require redacted paraphrase, manifest provenance, and quarantine review before fixture release.

sources.title: ClawsBench
sources.schema_summary: Agent trajectory traces across OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini CLI harnesses.
sources.notes: Restricted/eval-only pending provenance review for raw traces. Useful for cross-framework stress design; raw text is excluded from Apache-2.0 fixtures unless a later compatible release exists.

sources.title: ELEPHANT benchmark artifacts and social-sycophancy examples
sources.license: No compatible fixture license verified; benchmark artifact provenance review outstanding
sources.schema_summary: Social-sycophancy benchmark artifacts or examples, if obtained separately from the public paper page.
sources.notes: Restricted/eval-only until dataset provenance, redistribution terms, and any source-example privacy constraints are verified. Do not import raw rows or real session text.

sources.title: Public Claude Code trace datasets or uploaded session directories
sources.license: No compatible fixture license verified; uploader consent and trace provenance review outstanding
sources.schema_summary: Publicly uploaded Claude Code session traces, including message, tool-call, and tool-result shaped artifacts.
sources.notes: Restricted/eval-only pending provenance and consent review. Do not persist raw session text, hidden fields, tool outputs, paths, usernames, or repo identifiers.

sources.title: Hugging Face Agent Traces on the Hub
sources.schema_summary: Platform support for uploading local Claude Code and Codex session directories as trace datasets.
sources.notes: Used to shape collaboration privacy gates and raw-trace no-persist defaults.

sources.title: Dive into Claude Code: The Design Space of Today's and Future AI Agent Systems
sources.license: paper page, not a fixture license
sources.schema_summary: Paper analysis of Claude Code architecture, hooks, tools, subagents, and append-oriented session storage.
sources.notes: Used to justify closeout-boundary and trace-evidence design surfaces.

sources.title: OpenAI GPT-4o sycophancy incident write-up
sources.license: official blog page, not a fixture license
sources.schema_summary: Official incident narrative about an overly flattering GPT-4o update and rollback.
sources.notes: Taxonomy-only unless an explicit compatible dataset license is verified. Use for incident framing and mitigation vocabulary, not as corpus text.

sources.title: AgentLeak: A Full-Stack Benchmark for Privacy Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
sources.license: project page, not a fixture license
sources.schema_summary: Multi-agent privacy-leakage benchmark framing across communication channels and tool boundaries.
sources.notes: Taxonomy-only unless compatible dataset license and privacy review are verified. Do not import multi-agent messages or leakage examples.

sources.title: CowCorpus real-user collaborative web trajectories
sources.license: research blog and paper page, not a fixture license
sources.schema_summary: Real-user human-agent web trajectories and intervention-moment taxonomy.
sources.notes: Taxonomy-only unless license, user consent scope, and privacy review are verified. Do not import real-user trajectories or session text.

sources.title: CUA-Suite: Expert trajectories and pixel-precise grounding for computer-use agents
sources.license: project page, not a fixture license
sources.schema_summary: Computer-use agent ecosystem with expert videos, UI grounding annotations, and action-prediction benchmark surfaces.
sources.notes: Taxonomy-only unless compatible dataset license and privacy review are verified. Do not import video, OCR, action logs, or UI text into closeout fixtures.
